name: Dakishimetai!
overview: Asako Ikeuchi and Natsuko Hayakawa have been close friends for more than 25 years. Natsuko's husband Keisuke had affairs, so she asks Asako to let her stay at her house. Keisuke was once Asako's boyfriend. They will soon be 30 years old. There are other nice guys around Asako. It's a drama about their love and friendship.

trailers.title: 【TVドラマ-OP】抱きしめたい！ / 浅野温子　浅野ゆう子　岩城滉一
